<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnLockedBanner/CnLockedBanner.vue -->

### Props

| Name        | Type     | Required | Default                                                                                                    | Description                                                                                                                              |
| ----------- | -------- | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `lockedBy`  | `string` |          | `''`                                                                                                       | Display name (or username) of the user holding the lock. Comes from `useObjectLock().lockedBy`.                                          |
| `expiresAt` | `union`  |          | `null`                                                                                                     | Lock expiration as a Date instance. Comes from `useObjectLock().expiresAt`. When omitted, the "expires in N min" sub-line is suppressed. |
| `message`   | `string` |          | `function() \{     return t('nextcloud-vue', 'Locked by \{user\}', \{ user: this.lockedBy \|\| '?' \}) \}` | Override the rendered message. Useful for custom branding / tone. The default is `t('nextcloud-vue', 'Locked by {user}')`.               |
